findings.name: Default accounts still active
findings.context: Active defaults: SYSADMIN, GUEST, OPERATIONS, INITIAL_SETUP, ANONYMOUS, AUTOINSTALL, IBEGUEST
findings.description: 7 default/seeded EBS account(s) remain active. These accounts are well-known targets for attackers.
findings.recommendation: End-date or disable all default EBS accounts that are not operationally required.

findings.name: Inactive users not disabled
findings.description: 11 active user(s) have not logged in for more than 90 days.
findings.recommendation: Review and end-date accounts that are no longer in use.

findings.name: Users without end date
findings.description: 48 user accounts have no end date set.
findings.recommendation: Set end dates on user accounts aligned with contract or employment end dates.

findings.name: Orphan accounts without employee link
findings.description: 12 active user(s) have no link to an employee or person record.
findings.recommendation: Link user accounts to HR person records or end-date unneeded accounts.

findings.name: Terminated employees with active accounts
findings.description: 4 user(s) linked to terminated employees still have active EBS accounts.
findings.recommendation: Immediately end-date accounts for terminated employees.

findings.name: Shared or generic accounts detected
findings.description: 4 account(s) appear to be shared or generic.
findings.recommendation: Replace shared accounts with individual named accounts.

findings.name: Users never logged in
findings.description: 5 active account(s) created > 30 days ago have never been used.
findings.recommendation: Review and end-date unused accounts.

findings.name: Active user population summary
findings.description: The EBS instance has 50 active user accounts.
findings.recommendation: Periodically review the user population.

findings.name: Password never changed since creation
findings.description: 20 active user(s) have never changed their password.
findings.recommendation: Enforce password change on first login.

findings.name: Passwords older than 90 days
findings.description: 40 active user(s) have passwords older than 90 days.
findings.recommendation: Enforce a maximum password age of 60-90 days.

findings.name: Failed login limit not configured
findings.description: Failed login limit is not set, allowing unlimited brute-force attempts.
findings.recommendation: Set SIGNON_PASSWORD_FAILURE_LIMIT to 5 or less.

findings.name: Minimum password length too short
findings.description: Minimum password length is 6, below the recommended 8 characters.
findings.recommendation: Increase to at least 8.

findings.name: Password complexity not enforced
findings.description: Password complexity is not enabled.
findings.recommendation: Set SIGNON_PASSWORD_HARD_TO_GUESS to 'Y'.

findings.name: Password reuse not prevented
findings.description: Password history is not enforced.
findings.recommendation: Set SIGNON_PASSWORD_NO_REUSE to 6 or higher.

findings.name: Session timeout too long
findings.description: Session timeout is 120 minutes, exceeding the recommended 30 minutes.
findings.recommendation: Reduce ICX_SESSION_TIMEOUT to 30 minutes or less.

findings.name: Guest password contains default value
findings.description: The GUEST_USER_PWD appears to contain the default password.
findings.recommendation: Change the guest user password to a strong, unique value.

findings.name: Diagnostics enabled in production
findings.description: Diagnostics are enabled, exposing internal data.
findings.recommendation: Set FND_DIAGNOSTICS to 'N' in production.

findings.name: Application logging enabled in production
findings.description: Application logging is enabled, which may log sensitive data.
findings.recommendation: Set AFLOG_ENABLED to 'N' unless actively debugging.

findings.name: Servlet agent not using HTTPS
findings.description: The servlet agent URL does not use HTTPS.
findings.recommendation: Configure APPS_SERVLET_AGENT to use https://.

findings.name: Framework agent not using HTTPS
findings.description: The OA Framework agent URL does not use HTTPS.
findings.recommendation: Configure APPS_FRAMEWORK_AGENT to use https://.

findings.name: Sign-on notification disabled
findings.description: Users are not notified of previous login details.
findings.recommendation: Set SIGN_ON_NOTIFICATION to 'Y'.

findings.name: Concurrent session limit not set
findings.description: No limit on concurrent sessions per user.
findings.recommendation: Set ICX_LIMIT_CONNECT to restrict concurrent sessions.

findings.name: OA Framework customization enabled
findings.description: OA Framework personalization is enabled.
findings.recommendation: Set FND_CUSTOM_OA_DEFINTION to 'N' unless required.

findings.name: Sign-on audit level too low
findings.description: Sign-on audit level is at minimum.
findings.recommendation: Increase SIGNONAUDIT:LEVEL to 'C' or 'D'.

findings.name: Excessive System Administrator users
findings.context: SysAdmin users (7): DLEE, JSMITH, QADAMS, SYSADMIN, TESTUSER_QA, XYOUNG, YZHANG
findings.description: 7 users have the System Administrator responsibility.
findings.recommendation: Limit to 2-3 designated administrators.

findings.name: Users with multiple sensitive responsibilities
findings.context: Multi-sensitive (16 users): DLEE(10); JSMITH(9); NREEVES(6); SYSADMIN(5); XYOUNG(4); ABROWN(4); WCLARK(4); YZHANG(3); MJOHNSON(3); OCONNOR(3)
findings.description: 16 user(s) hold 3+ sensitive responsibilities.
findings.recommendation: Remove unnecessary sensitive access.

findings.name: Too many users on 'System Administrator'
findings.description: The 'System Administrator' responsibility is assigned to 7 users.
findings.recommendation: Reduce users with 'System Administrator'.

findings.name: Too many users on 'Payables Manager'
findings.description: The 'Payables Manager' responsibility is assigned to 18 users.
findings.recommendation: Reduce users with 'Payables Manager'.

findings.name: Too many users on 'General Ledger Super User'
findings.context: 'General Ledger Super User' assigned to 12 users (threshold: 10)
findings.description: The 'General Ledger Super User' responsibility is assigned to 12 users.
findings.recommendation: Reduce users with 'General Ledger Super User'.

findings.name: Too many users on 'Purchasing Super User'
findings.description: The 'Purchasing Super User' responsibility is assigned to 14 users.
findings.recommendation: Reduce users with 'Purchasing Super User'.

findings.name: Inactive responsibilities still assigned
findings.context: Inactive resps assigned: Legacy Reporting Resp
findings.description: 1 end-dated responsibility(ies) are still assigned to active users.
findings.recommendation: Remove user assignments for decommissioned responsibilities.

findings.name: Custom responsibilities with admin menus
findings.context: Admin-menu resps: Custom Finance Admin, Custom Reporting Tool, IT Operations Console
findings.description: 3 custom responsibility(ies) use system administration menus.
findings.recommendation: Replace admin menus with purpose-built restricted menus.

findings.name: SoD conflict: AP/AR
findings.context: AP/AR conflict (6 users): CGARCIA, DLEE, JSMITH, NREEVES, RWILLIAMS, WCLARK
findings.description: 6 user(s) hold responsibilities in both conflicting areas. Can create payable invoices and receive AR payments.
findings.recommendation: Remove one side of the AP/AR conflict or implement compensating controls.

findings.name: SoD conflict: AP/PO
findings.context: AP/PO conflict (11 users): ABROWN, BMARTIN, DLEE, JSMITH, MJOHNSON, NREEVES, OCONNOR, PBAKER, RWILLIAMS, SYSADMIN
findings.description: 11 user(s) hold responsibilities in both conflicting areas. Can create POs and approve AP invoices.
findings.recommendation: Remove one side of the AP/PO conflict or implement compensating controls.

findings.name: SoD conflict: GL/AP
findings.context: GL/AP conflict (10 users): ABROWN, CGARCIA, DLEE, JSMITH, MJOHNSON, NREEVES, OCONNOR, SYSADMIN, WCLARK, XYOUNG
findings.description: 10 user(s) hold responsibilities in both conflicting areas. Can post journals and manage payables.
findings.recommendation: Remove one side of the GL/AP conflict or implement compensating controls.

findings.name: SoD conflict: PO/INV
findings.context: PO/INV conflict (5 users): ABROWN, DLEE, JSMITH, PBAKER, TWONG
findings.description: 5 user(s) hold responsibilities in both conflicting areas. Can order goods and receive inventory.
findings.recommendation: Remove one side of the PO/INV conflict or implement compensating controls.

findings.name: SoD conflict: Admin/AP
findings.context: Admin/AP conflict (4 users): DLEE, JSMITH, SYSADMIN, XYOUNG
findings.description: 4 user(s) hold responsibilities in both conflicting areas. Can create users and process payments.
findings.recommendation: Remove one side of the Admin/AP conflict or implement compensating controls.

findings.name: SoD conflict: HR/AP
findings.context: HR/AP conflict (6 users): DLEE, JSMITH, KPATEL, NREEVES, SYSADMIN, VHARRIS
findings.description: 6 user(s) hold responsibilities in both conflicting areas. Can maintain employees and process payments.
findings.recommendation: Remove one side of the HR/AP conflict or implement compensating controls.

findings.name: Dangerous programs in non-admin request groups
findings.context: Dangerous program access: FNDCPASS -> Finance Reports Group; FNDLOAD -> Finance Reports Group; XLOLOAD -> Finance Reports Group; FNDSCARU -> Purchasing Reports Group; CONCSUB -> Purchasing Reports Group; AABORDFR -> Inventory Request Group; FNDLOAD -> Custom Operations Group; FNDMDGEN -> HR Reports Group
findings.description: 8 dangerous concurrent program(s) are accessible through non-admin request groups.
findings.recommendation: Remove dangerous programs from non-admin request groups.

findings.name: Host-based concurrent programs enabled
findings.context: Host programs (5): CUSTOM_HOST_PROG1, CUSTOM_HOST_PROG2, CUSTOM_HOST_PROG3, CUSTOM_HOST_PROG4, CUSTOM_HOST_PROG5
findings.description: 5 host-based concurrent program(s) can execute OS-level commands.
findings.recommendation: Review and disable unnecessary host-based programs.

findings.name: Application-level request group access
findings.description: 3 request group entry(ies) grant access to ALL programs in an application.
findings.recommendation: Replace with explicit program-level grants.

findings.name: Programs running as privileged user
findings.context: Privileged submissions: SYSADMIN(11 requests); AUTOINSTALL(4 requests)
findings.description: Concurrent requests submitted under privileged accounts in the last 30 days.
findings.recommendation: Run programs under individual named user accounts.

findings.name: EBS audit trail not enabled
findings.description: The Oracle EBS AuditTrail feature is not enabled.
findings.recommendation: Set AUDITTRAIL:ACTIVATE to 'Y' at Site level.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_DIRECT
findings.context: FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_DIRECT (User-responsibility assignments) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_DIRECT table (User-responsibility assignments) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_DIRECT to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: AP_CHECKS_ALL
findings.context: AP_CHECKS_ALL (AP payment checks) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The AP_CHECKS_ALL table (AP payment checks) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add AP_CHECKS_ALL to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: AP_INVOICES_ALL
findings.context: AP_INVOICES_ALL (AP invoices) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The AP_INVOICES_ALL table (AP invoices) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add AP_INVOICES_ALL to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL
findings.context: AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL (AP invoice distributions) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL table (AP invoice distributions) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: GL_JE_HEADERS
findings.context: GL_JE_HEADERS (GL journal headers) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The GL_JE_HEADERS table (GL journal headers) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add GL_JE_HEADERS to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: GL_JE_LINES
findings.context: GL_JE_LINES (GL journal lines) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The GL_JE_LINES table (GL journal lines) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add GL_JE_LINES to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: PO_HEADERS_ALL
findings.context: PO_HEADERS_ALL (Purchase orders) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The PO_HEADERS_ALL table (Purchase orders) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add PO_HEADERS_ALL to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: PO_REQUISITION_HEADERS_ALL
findings.context: PO_REQUISITION_HEADERS_ALL (Purchase requisitions) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The PO_REQUISITION_HEADERS_ALL table (Purchase requisitions) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add PO_REQUISITION_HEADERS_ALL to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL
findings.context: AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL (AR cash receipts) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL table (AR cash receipts) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS
findings.context: MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS (Inventory transactions) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS table (Inventory transactions) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
findings.context: PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F (Employee master) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F table (Employee master) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Critical table not audited: PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F
findings.context: PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F (Payroll element entries) — not in active audit schema
findings.description: The PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F table (Payroll element entries) is not being audited.
findings.recommendation: Add PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F to an audit group and enable auditing.

findings.name: Sign-on audit level insufficient
findings.description: Sign-on audit level is not configured or at minimum.
findings.recommendation: Set SIGNONAUDIT:LEVEL to 'C' or 'D'.

findings.name: Audit data retention review needed
findings.description: 2,847,561 audit records older than 365 days.
findings.recommendation: Implement audit data archival and purge strategy.

findings.name: Default database accounts not locked
findings.context: Unlocked defaults: SYS(OPEN), SYSTEM(OPEN), SCOTT(OPEN), DBSNMP(OPEN), OUTLN(OPEN), MDSYS(OPEN), ORDSYS(OPEN), CTXSYS(OPEN), DIP(OPEN), EXFSYS(OPEN), PERFSTAT(OPEN)
findings.description: 11 default database account(s) are not locked.
findings.recommendation: Lock and expire all default accounts not operationally required.

findings.name: PUBLIC has EXECUTE on sensitive packages
findings.context: PUBLIC EXECUTE: UTL_FILE, UTL_HTTP, UTL_SMTP, UTL_TCP, DBMS_SQL, DBMS_LOB, DBMS_RANDOM
findings.description: PUBLIC has EXECUTE on 7 sensitive package(s).
findings.recommendation: Revoke EXECUTE from PUBLIC on sensitive packages.

findings.name: Excessive DBA role grants
findings.context: DBA grantees: XXCUSTOM1 [WITH ADMIN], XXCUSTOM2, XX_ETL, XX_MIGRATION [WITH ADMIN]
findings.description: 4 non-default schema(s) have the DBA role.
findings.recommendation: Revoke DBA and create custom roles with minimum privileges.

findings.name: UTL_FILE_DIR parameter set
findings.description: UTL_FILE_DIR can allow file system access.
findings.recommendation: Remove or restrict utl_file_dir. Use Directory objects.

findings.name: Remote OS authentication enabled
findings.description: Remote OS authentication allows any client to authenticate as an OS-authenticated user.
findings.recommendation: Set remote_os_authent to FALSE.

findings.name: Database links detected
findings.context: DB links (7): APPS.EBSDEV.ACMECORP.COM; APPS.EBSUAT.ACMECORP.COM; APPS.DW_LINK.ACMECORP.COM; XXCUSTOM1.LEGACY_SYSTEM.WORLD; XX_ETL.STAGING_DB.ACMECORP.COM; XX_INTEGRATION.ERP_LINK.PARTNER.COM; PUBLIC.HR_REPORTING.WORLD
findings.description: 7 database link(s) exist.
findings.recommendation: Review and remove unused links.

findings.name: Sensitive package grants to non-DBA schemas
findings.context: Package grants: XXCUSTOM1->UTL_FILE; XXCUSTOM1->UTL_HTTP; XXCUSTOM1->DBMS_SQL; XXCUSTOM2->UTL_FILE; XXCUSTOM2->UTL_TCP; XX_ETL->UTL_FILE; XX_ETL->UTL_HTTP; XX_ETL->UTL_SMTP; XX_ETL->DBMS_JAVA; XX_INTEGRATION->UTL_HTTP
findings.description: 12 non-DBA schema(s) have EXECUTE on sensitive packages.
findings.recommendation: Review and revoke unnecessary grants.

findings.name: Excessive open database accounts
findings.context: Open accounts (33): SCOTT, OUTLN, ORDSYS, DIP, EXFSYS, PERFSTAT, GL, AP, AR, PO, INV, ONT, CE, PA, FA ...
findings.description: 33 non-system database accounts are OPEN.
findings.recommendation: Review and lock accounts that don't need direct DB access.

findings.name: Case-sensitive logon disabled
findings.description: Case-sensitive password matching is disabled.
findings.recommendation: Set sec_case_sensitive_logon to TRUE.

findings.name: Password verify function not set in DEFAULT profile
findings.description: The DEFAULT profile does not enforce a password verify function.
findings.recommendation: Set PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION to ORA12C_VERIFY_FUNCTION.

findings.name: EBS version nearing end-of-life
findings.description: Oracle EBS 12.1.3 is in Extended Support.
findings.recommendation: Plan migration to EBS 12.2.x.

findings.name: Last applied patch
findings.description: Most recently applied patch: 34567890 (2025-07-15).
findings.recommendation: Ensure quarterly CPU patches are applied within 90 days.

findings.name: Database version nearing end-of-life
findings.context: DB: Oracle Database 12c Enterprise Edition Release 12.1.0.2.0
findings.description: Oracle Database 12c is in Extended Support.
findings.recommendation: Plan upgrade to Oracle Database 19c LTS or later.

findings.name: No patches applied in 6 months
findings.description: No patches applied in the last 6 months.
findings.recommendation: Apply the latest quarterly CPU and recommended patches.

findings.name: Stuck workflow items detected
findings.context: Stuck items (6,938): POAPPRV(2450); APINV(1870); OEOL(945); GLBATCH(623); REQAPPRV(412); HRSSA(287); ARRECPT(195); WFERROR(156)
findings.description: 6,938 workflow item(s) have been open > 30 days.
findings.recommendation: Investigate and resolve stuck workflow items.

findings.name: Workflow mailer not running
findings.description: Workflow Notification Mailer 'Workflow Notification Mailer' is 'STOPPED'.
findings.recommendation: Start the mailer from the OAM console.

findings.name: Workflow activity errors in last 30 days
findings.description: 847 workflow activity(ies) have errored.
findings.recommendation: Review and address root causes.

findings.name: Workflow background engine not running
findings.context: Stopped engines: Workflow Deferred Agent Listener=STOPPED; Workflow Java Deferred Agent Listener=STOPPED
findings.description: Workflow background engines are not running.
findings.recommendation: Start workflow engines from the OAM console.
